source.body_text_sample:
BUY TICKETS

PLAN YOUR TRIP
DOCK LOCATIONS
FARE-SAVING
CAREERS
FAQ
CONTACT
Careers
Joining Our Team

Please email your resume to info@theaquabus.com to apply.

We are always looking for hardworking, personable individuals to join our team. We employ both deckhands and skippers on board our boats. The certificates required for each position are as follows:

Deckhand:

SDV-BS

Skipper:

SDV-BS
SVOP
ROC-M
Standard First Aid with CPR-C-AED

Please note that while it is an asset to have your certificates when you apply, it is not required; we frequently hire new staff who are not yet certified and help to guide them through the registration process.

If you are interested in applying for a position with us, or simply want to learn more about what a job with Aquabus entails, please feel free to get in touch with us through email (info@theaquabus.com) or by phone (604-689-5858). We are always happy to answer questions from prospective employees!


Service Bulletin

We are open for service from
7:00am-11:00pm, 7 days a week.

Please check each dock location page for exact hours of operation and follow us on Twitter for up-to-date service notifications.

@AQUABUS
